context: Tests whether the agent correctly consolidates a project's fragmented configuration files into a single vite.config.ts following Vite+ conventions, enables type-aware lint options, and handles the baseUrl incompatibility with Vite+ type-aware checks that causes silent failures.

checklist.name: No parallel vitest.config.ts
checklist.description: The output does NOT include a `vitest.config.ts` file — test configuration has been moved into the `test` block inside `vite.config.ts`

checklist.name: No .oxlintrc* files
checklist.description: The output does NOT include any `.oxlintrc`, `.oxlintrc.json`, `.oxlintrc.yml`, or similar oxlint standalone config files — lint config has been consolidated into `vite.config.ts`

checklist.name: No parallel tsdown.config.ts
checklist.description: The output does NOT include a `tsdown.config.ts` file — packaging config has been moved into `vite.config.ts`

checklist.name: typeAware enabled
checklist.description: The `vite.config.ts` includes `lint: { options: { typeAware: true } }` (or equivalent nested structure with `typeAware: true` inside the lint options)

checklist.name: typeCheck enabled
checklist.description: The `vite.config.ts` includes `lint: { options: { typeCheck: true } }` (or equivalent with `typeCheck: true` inside the lint options)

checklist.name: baseUrl incompatibility addressed
checklist.description: The `compilerOptions.baseUrl` is either removed from `tsconfig.json` OR the output explicitly documents that `baseUrl` causes Vite+ to silently skip type-aware checks and recommends removing it

checklist.name: Staged config in vite.config.ts
checklist.description: Pre-commit / staged hook configuration is placed inside the `staged` property of the root `defineConfig` in `vite.config.ts`, rather than in a separate Husky or lint-staged config

checklist.name: No Husky or lint-staged config
checklist.description: The output does NOT create or preserve `.husky/pre-commit`, `.husky/` directory, or any `lint-staged` configuration block in `package.json`

checklist.name: vp migrate referenced
checklist.description: The migration notes, README, or a migration script references `vp migrate` as the recommended migration entry point (rather than purely describing manual file edits)
